name: anejo-app
description: Añejo Catering Co. — marketing site + AI macro calculator (public self-serve) + trainer portal. One Cloudflare Pages app.

scripts.build:studio: npm --prefix hub-app run build && rm -rf public/studio && mkdir -p public/studio && cp -R hub-app/dist/index.html hub-app/dist/assets public/studio/ && find public/studio -name '*.map' -delete
scripts.lint: eslint functions/api/auth functions/_lib/login.js functions/_lib/pin.js functions/_lib/session.js functions/_lib/roles.js test/auth
